zotero.abstractNote: Causal models are often too complex to be useful for downstream tasks. We propose a framework for targeted reduction of causal models, which allows us to simplify a causal model while preserving its causal properties relevant to a specific task. Our approach is based on the idea of causal abstraction, where we map a high-dimensional causal model to a lower-dimensional one. We provide theoretical guarantees for our method and demonstrate its effectiveness on several synthetic and real-world datasets.
